stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound cookie_request packet framing and dispatch/decode for one Identifier key fixture only; do not infer cookie storage policy, cookie request/response runtime behavior, initialized client/server state, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
